data.title: Albertsons factors rising fuel costs into fulfillment, delivery
data.description: On Albertsons' fiscal Q4 2025 earnings call with analysts, executives shared how the retailer is approaching inflation and overall cost increases. In particular, its CEO and CFO each addressed the fuel impacts of the U.S. and Israel's war on Iran.

data.title: Tariffs, war impact Fastenal growth in Q1
data.description: Fastenal's digital footprint helped grow overall sales in its fiscal Q1, but executives noted challenges tied to war in the Middle East and tariffs.

data.title: Amazon expands grocery delivery partnership with Winn-Dixie in Florida
data.description: Amazon and Winn-Dixie have each been closing physical stores at the end of 2025 and in the first half of 2026. At the same time, Amazon has been making a push to increase its online grocery sales and and same-day deliveries.

data.title: Walmart begins accepting CareCredit cards for health and wellness purchases
data.description: The expanded Walmart and Synchrony collaboration features CareCredit cards that consumers can use for payments online and in physical stores.

data.title: American Express launches developer kit, purchase protection for agentic commerce
data.description: The developer kit "focuses on trust, control and visibility when transactions are initiated by an agent and highlights the underlying payments infrastructure necessary around authentication and intent," according to American Express.
